Retractor Lite 31 Specifications for Professional Display Setup

Premium Aluminum Construction
Built with lightweight yet durable aluminum base construction, the Retractor Lite 31 hardware provides reliable performance for trade shows, events, and professional presentations.

Professional Display Features:

  • Lightweight aluminum base weighing only 6lbs for easy transport
  • Available in black or silver finish to match your branding
  • Two swivel feet provide enhanced stability on various surfaces
  • Shock cord pole system enables quick setup and breakdown
  • Banner attaches securely with snap rail (top) and banner tape (bottom)
  • Compact storage footprint for efficient transport

Product Dimensions:
Display Size: 32" W x 84" H x 15" D
Hardware Weight: 6lbs
Banner sold separately - hardware only

The Retractor Lite 31 hardware accommodates custom banner graphics up to 32" wide, making it ideal for trade show booths, retail displays, corporate presentations, and promotional events where professional presentation matters.

Banner Artwork Specifications for Retractor Lite 31 Hardware

Banner Compatibility Requirements
The Retractor Lite 31 hardware requires specific banner dimensions and attachment specifications for proper display and professional appearance.

Required Banner Specifications:

  • Banner Width: 32" maximum width for proper hardware fit
  • Banner Height: Up to 84" maximum display height
  • Top Attachment: Banner must include snap rail compatible edge
  • Bottom Attachment: Banner tape hem required for proper tension

Recommended Banner Materials:

  • Vinyl Banners: 13oz scrim vinyl for outdoor durability
  • Fabric Banners: Wrinkle-resistant fabric for professional appearance
  • Mesh Banners: For outdoor applications requiring wind resistance
  • Canvas Banners: Premium textile appearance for upscale displays

Design Considerations:

  • Keep critical content within safe margins from edges
  • Consider viewing height when positioning text and graphics
  • Account for hardware width when designing layout
  • Ensure adequate contrast for visibility in display environment

Banner Ordering:
Banners are sold separately from hardware. When ordering banners for use with Retractor Lite 31 hardware, specify "snap rail top" and "banner tape bottom" finishing options to ensure proper compatibility.

Professional banner design services are available to create custom graphics optimized for your Retractor Lite 31 display hardware.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Retractor Lite 31 Hardware Frequently Asked Questions

What banner sizes work with Retractor Lite 31 hardware?

The hardware accommodates banners up to 32" wide and 84" tall. Banners must include snap rail finishing on top and banner tape hem on bottom for proper attachment.

How much does the Retractor Lite 31 hardware weigh?

The complete hardware weighs only 6lbs, making it easy to transport and set up by one person at trade shows and events.

Are banners included with the hardware?

No, this is hardware only. Custom banners are ordered separately and must include snap rail and banner tape finishing for compatibility with this hardware.

What's the difference between black and silver finish options?

Both finishes offer the same durability and functionality. Black provides a modern, professional look while silver offers a classic appearance that coordinates with most display environments.

How quickly can Retractor Lite 31 hardware be set up?

The shock cord pole system and snap rail attachment allow setup in just a few minutes. The swivel feet provide immediate stability on level surfaces.

Can this hardware be used outdoors?

The Retractor Lite 31 is designed for indoor use. For outdoor applications, consider weighted bases and wind-resistant banner materials, or explore our outdoor-specific display options.

What shipping options are available for hardware orders?

We offer ground, expedited, and overnight shipping options. Hardware is securely packaged to prevent damage during transport, with tracking provided for all shipments.

Do you offer volume pricing for multiple hardware units?

Yes, business accounts receive volume pricing on bulk orders. Contact customer service to set up a business account and discuss pricing for multiple units.
